Make a Reservation
Indulge the Moment
A memorable meal isn’t just about what’s on the plate. It’s about what happens around it: the stories, the laughter, the time spent with loved ones. This is dining like it was meant to be—unrushed, a little indulgent, and always better with good company. Settle in, pass the plates, and enjoy your evening to the fullest.
Let’s Make magic

--- Page: /menus ---
Menus | Luella — Luella
0
A Plate for Every Palate
Your Night Your Way
Make a Reservation
“Good Hospitality Never goes out of style”
Some evenings call for tradition: a Caesar salad, a seared filet, a glass of Bordeaux, and conversation. Others feel more spontaneous: oysters, caviar, martinis, and stolen glances.
At Luella, there’s no script—just your appetite and the occasion. From crudo and raw bar classics to contemporary steakhouse favorites, our menu offers something for every mood.
And at the bar, our head Alchemist crafts cocktails with intention, using house-made shrubs, bitters, and tinctures to give familiar favorites a fresh perspective.
Arrow Up

--- Page: /events ---
Events | Luella — Luella
0
Private Events
LET THE EVENING UNFOLD
Whether you’re planning an intimate celebration or a once-in-a-lifetime gathering, Luella offers the perfect setting. From candlelit dinners in our private dining spaces to full restaurant buyouts, we help curate events that feel as effortless as they are unforgettable.
We are currently open Tuesday-Saturday. Any requests sent on Saturday-Monday will be responded to the following Tuesday. We have very limited space available for large parties and have been inundated with requests. We are BLOWN AWAY by your support. We are responding as quickly as we possibly can. Thank you for your understanding.
BOOK YOUR EVENT
“TO THE MOMENTS THAT MATTER”
A credit card is required within 48 hours of placing a reservation hold. Once provided, the hold remains valid for an additional 48 hours. If the booking is not finalized within this timeframe, we reserve the right to release the table.
Arrow Up

--- Page: /about ---
About | Luella — Luella
0
A Legacy of Hospitality
For Unforgettable evenings
“Southern Grace & European Pace”
The Past
It all began at Shirahland, our family farm where visitors came to hunt quail and left with something far greater—an experience filled with memories of good food and good service.
Hospitality is in our bloodline. Family is everything to us.
The Present
While many chase speed and efficiency, we embrace presence—the art of truly being here, now.
Recognizing that the conversation and atmosphere are as important as the food, we allow time to talk, laugh, and relax between courses. We encourage guests to linger for coffee, dessert, or a night cap.
The Future
Luella is named to honor the next generation in the Shirah family lineage and continue the legacy of curating unforgettable experiences, creating opportunities for guests to enjoy, relax, and live in the moment.
With old-school manners, effortless elegance, and an eye for detail, Luella is more than a restaurant—it’s a living legacy. A place where hospitality isn’t just a practice—it’s a pedigree.

Make a Reservation
